calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Modifying Trust For Changed Circumstances
Off Calendar Jun-08-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Gary Rothstein, via ZOOM, counsel for MUFG Union Bank, N.A., Petitioner.

The court begins by stating that petition in this matter had been reviewed by the court and the court is satisfied with venue and that the matter had been left on the calendar to allow for objections. No objections are presented.

The Petition for Order Modifying Trust for Changed Circumstances is taken under submission with the intent to grant.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.
